docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RICHARD LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICENTE MENESES IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY DAVID NAVARRO, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY LEE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, VICENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED MAY-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, VICENTE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO AUGUST-02-2017 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT 506 TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2017 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO AUG-02-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD LEE APPEARED. DEFENDANT VICTOR MENESES APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENESES, VICENTE $7,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,340.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, VICENTE HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF RICHARD LEE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, VICENTE HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
